task_completion.description: Set the observer location to Boston and time to November 15, 2024, 03:00 UTC
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bottom toolbar or location/date-time dialogs in Stellarium should display the location as 'Boston' and the date/time as '2024-11-15' and '03:00'.

task_completion.description: Find and center the view on the star Algol
task_completion.visual_evidence: Algol should be selected (indicated by a target reticle/crosshair with its information displayed in the top left) and positioned in the center of the Stellarium viewport.

task_completion.description: Disable the atmosphere and enable the equatorial grid
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sky background must be dark (no blue atmospheric scattering/glow) and the curved lines of the equatorial grid (RA/Dec coordinates) must be visible across the sky.
Stick-figure lines connecting the stars (constellation lines) and text labels for the constellations (e.g., 'Perseus' near Algol) must be visible on the sky map.

task_completion.description: Create an observation plan file with the required details
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) or terminal window should be visible showing a file named 'algol_plan.txt' containing the words 'Algol', 'Perseus', and 'Boston'.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the configured view to the correct directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A temporary on-screen notification in Stellarium saying 'Screenshot saved...' or a file manager/terminal showing the saved image file inside the '~/Pictures/stellarium/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Stellarium GUI to configure the view
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Stellarium application open with visible menus, toolbars, or search windows being used, rather than just terminal commands editing configuration files.

integrity.description: The agent manually created and edited the observation plan
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor or terminal should show the agent typing or saving the file, rather than copying a pre-existing file or pasting the exact prompt text without formatting.

integrity.description: The screenshot was generated from the live Stellarium application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshot should clearly be a capture of the Stellarium viewport with the specific requested settings, not a downloaded image from a web browser.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: Algol in the constellation Perseus. Location: Boston, MA (42.36° N, 71.05° W). Date/Time: 2024-11-15 03:00:00 UTC. Required display settings: Atmosphere OFF, Constellation lines ON, Constellation labels ON, Equatorial grid ON. The observation plan must be saved at ~/Desktop/algol_plan.txt and contain the words 'Algol', 'Perseus', and 'Boston'. Screenshots must be saved to ~/Pictures/stellarium/.
